# dom-harness

> A lightweight TypeScript base class for building DOM component test harnesses, inspired by Angular CDK's ComponentHarness. Extend `DomHarness` to encapsulate selectors and interactions behind a clean API — works with any UI framework (React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Solid, Preact).

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/koorchik/dom-harness/blob/master/README.md): Full documentation with API reference, patterns, and usage examples
- [Full LLM documentation](https://github.com/koorchik/dom-harness/blob/master/llms-full.txt): Complete API reference and examples optimized for LLM consumption
- [Source](https://github.com/koorchik/dom-harness/blob/master/src/DomHarness.ts): Single-file implementation (~110 lines)

## Examples

- [React](https://github.com/koorchik/dom-harness/tree/master/examples/react)
- [Vue](https://github.com/koorchik/dom-harness/tree/master/examples/vue)
- [Svelte](https://github.com/koorchik/dom-harness/tree/master/examples/svelte)
- [Angular](https://github.com/koorchik/dom-harness/tree/master/examples/angular)
- [Solid](https://github.com/koorchik/dom-harness/tree/master/examples/solid)
- [Preact](https://github.com/koorchik/dom-harness/tree/master/examples/preact)
